name: alloflow-desktop
description: Privacy-first desktop tools for accessible and differentiated learning.

scripts.package:win:direct: npm run web:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win nsis --x64 --arm64 --publish never
scripts.package:win:ci: npm run web:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win nsis --x64 --arm64 --publish never
scripts.package:mac:ci: npm run web:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --mac dmg zip --x64 --arm64 --publish never
scripts.package:win-arm64: npm run web:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win nsis --arm64
scripts.package:win-x64: npm run web:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win nsis --x64
scripts.package:mac: npm run web:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --mac dmg zip --x64 --arm64
scripts.package:mac-arm64: npm run web:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --mac dmg zip --arm64
scripts.package:mac-x64: npm run web:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --mac dmg zip --x64
scripts.verify: npm run electron:check && npm run verify:contract && npm run verify:artifact-verifier
scripts.verify:release: npm run verify && npm run runtime:smoke && npm run ui:smoke

author: AlloFlow
